name: Official Bhootiyagiri
overview:
Dilawar Rana, is known for his sharp business acumen, so much so that the place he was last sent to, a jail, now functions as a successful startup selling papads and the emotional stories of convicts reform.

In its third chapter, CEO Dilawar Rana tries to clear his image of a fraudster and rise to success once again to prove to the world that he is indeed a man with good business acumen.
